2026-04-09T22:08:31.4924399Z ● Read agent_output.json
2026-04-09T22:08:31.4925305Z   │ /tmp/gh-aw/threat-detection/agent_output.json
2026-04-09T22:08:31.4925967Z   └ 1 line read
2026-04-09T22:08:31.4926203Z 
2026-04-09T22:08:35.9875696Z The agent output contains a GitHub issue creation and dispatch_triage call for the Azure SDK Advisor documentation gap. I've reviewed both files thoroughly.
2026-04-09T22:08:35.9877303Z 
2026-04-09T22:08:35.9877849Z **Analysis:**
